items.title: feat(workboard): add board ops recovery metadata
items.summary: feat(workboard): add board ops recovery metadata Add board-scoped Workboard metadata, stats, and recovery operations.\n\nIncludes gateway/tool contracts, docs, UI normalization, and regression coverage for board-scoped idempotency, linked child manifests, recovery diagnostics, and worker context.
